_meta.purpose: Lender contacts employer DIRECTLY to confirm what borrower claimed on Form 1003 — position, start date, salary, likelihood of continued employment. Two flavors: written VOE (form-based, slower, more authoritative) and verbal VOE (call HR within 10 business days of close, faster, used as 'closing protection').

response.remarks: Maria has been a consistent high performer. No disciplinary actions in her file. She is currently leading our cloud-cost-optimization initiative. We have no reason to believe employment will not continue indefinitely.

verbal_voe_closing_check.purpose: Final verbal confirmation within 10 business days of closing (per Fannie Mae B3-3.1-07). Phone call to HR confirms 'is Maria still employed as of today?' — protects against borrower being terminated between application and closing.
